regions.text: How do we know if a man is telling the truth? If he promises three bags of grain for one sheep, we know the truth when the grain arrives.
A man may mean to give the grain, but if he doesn't, he is not true to his word.
We sometimes know if a man tells the truth by the look in his eye or the sound of his voice.
truth: things which are true. A man tells the truth when what he says is true.
